input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Advanced tests that deliberately exercise OGNL's deprecated SecurityManager integration or JDK-internal accessibility paths may need targeted per-test handling such as setting ognl.security.manager or preserving existing --add-opens JVM args, but this is not required for normal meaningful OGNL coverage.
The reported Java-run failure appears tied to existing version-update test behavior on JDK 25 rather than missing external setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL 3.3.5 is a pure in-process expression/navigation library; its only runtime dependency is transitive org.javassist:javassist:3.29.0-GA, so meaningful parser/evaluation/reflection coverage is reachable without extra dependencies, Docker, or required environment/system properties.
